arts.ttl: Belief Nottingham Forest star could break transfer records – English and Spanish giants have him in their sights
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest defender Murillo could break the transfer record for a defender as he is being eyed by Chelsea, Liverpool, Barcelona and Real Madrid. That’s according to UOL, who cover the Brazilian revolution at Nottingham Forest this season and how Murillo is at the centre of it.
